input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.14.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.14.3.3
            TITLE: violation with potential or actual effect on safety or environment:  240 sec up to dnf or dq

            CONTENT:
            rule D.14.3.3: Violation with potential or actual effect on safety or environment:  240 sec up to DNF or DQ
D.14.3.3 Violation with potential or actual effect on safety or environment:  240 sec up to DNF or DQ

final_answer: D.14.3.3 Violation with potential or actual effect on safety or environment: 240 sec up to DNF or DQ
